summary: Aravind Srinivas @AravSrinivas · 6月19日 Context graphs will be the best way for businesses to enable and deploy agentic harnesses. There's a lot of context fragmentation across so many different tools in every company. A god-mode view that self-improves and self-organizes is the way tacit knowledge can be captured. 80 97 977 10万
